title: Codex Steer Architecture
brief: Codex 用 Rust 写的四层架构图,展示 steer 请求自上而下的路径。从上到下四个清晰层块:第一层 TUI codex-tui,Enter 发起 steer,Tab 排队,三态队列;第二层 App Server,turn/steer 请求处理与校验;第三层 App-Server-Protocol,TurnSteerParams 线协议含 input 与 expected_turn_id;第四层 Core codex-core,Session steer_input 校验链到 InputQueue pending_input 到 turn loop drain。层间箭头表示 steer 调用向下传递。右侧一条竖向标注 安全边界:turn loop 在工具或模型边界 drain pending_input。干净的仓库架构风,清晰块克制装饰,明确层级与依赖标签,中英文。
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Codex Steer Architecture'. Diagram type: repo architecture diagram. Use a clean repository architecture diagram, crisp blocks, restrained decoration, clear ownership and dependency labels. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
Codex 用 Rust 写的四层架构图,展示 steer 请求自上而下的路径。从上到下四个清晰层块:第一层 TUI codex-tui,Enter 发起 steer,Tab 排队,三态队列;第二层 App Server,turn/steer 请求处理与校验;第三层 App-Server-Protocol,TurnSteerParams 线协议含 input 与 expected_turn_id;第四层 Core codex-core,Session steer_input 校验链到 InputQueue pending_input 到 turn loop drain。层间箭头表示 steer 调用向下传递。右侧一条竖向标注 安全边界:turn loop 在工具或模型边界 drain pending_input。干净的仓库架构风,清晰块克制装饰,明确层级与依赖标签,中英文。
